## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user-visible or architectural problem does this change address?

## Root Cause

What caused the issue?

## Solution

Explain why this implementation is the right scope.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run doctor`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual verification on a supported platform

## Risks

Call out selector fragility, export compatibility, or runtime behavior changes.
